\"nested_block_set\"}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":          {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"ami\":         {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"list_field\":  {Type: cty.List(cty.String), Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"special\":     {Type: cty.Bool, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"some_number\": {Type: cty.Number, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"map_key\":     {Type: cty.Map(cty.Number), Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"map_whole\":   {Type: cty.Map(cty.String), Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tBlockTypes: map[string]*configschema.NestedBlock{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"nested_block\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tBlock: configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"an_attr\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNesting: configschema.NestingList,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"nested_block_set\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tBlock: configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"an_attr\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNesting: configschema.NestingSet,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example will be updated in-place\n  ~ resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      # Warning: this attribute value will no longer be marked as sensitive\n      # after applying this change. The value is unchanged.\n      ~ ami         = (sensitive value)\n        id          = \"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"\n      ~ list_field  = [\n            # (1 unchanged element hidden)\n            \"friends\",\n          # Warning: this attribute value will no longer be marked as sensitive\n          # after applying this change. The value is unchanged.\n          ~ (sensitive value),\n        ]\n      ~ map_key     = {\n          # Warning: this attribute value will no longer be marked as sensitive\n          # after applying this change. The value is unchanged.\n          ~ \"dinner\"    = (sensitive value)\n            # (1 unchanged element hidden)\n        }\n      # Warning: this attribute value will no longer be marked as sensitive\n      # after applying this change. The value is unchanged.\n      ~ map_whole   = (sensitive value)\n      # Warning: this attribute value will no longer be marked as sensitive\n      # after applying this change. The value is unchanged.\n      ~ some_number = (sensitive value)\n      # Warning: this attribute value will no longer be marked as sensitive\n      # after applying this change. The value is unchanged.\n      ~ special     = (sensitive value)\n\n      # Warning: this block will no longer be marked as sensitive\n      # after applying this change.\n      ~ nested_block {\n          # At least one attribute in this block is (or was) sensitive,\n          # so its contents will not be displayed.\n        }\n\n      # Warning: this block will no longer be marked as sensitive\n      # after applying this change.\n      ~ nested_block_set {\n          # At least one attribute in this block is (or was) sensitive,\n          # so its contents will not be displayed.\n        }\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"deletion\": {\n\t\t\tAction: plans.Delete,\n\t\t\tMode:   addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"ami\": cty.StringVal(\"ami-BEFORE\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"list_field\": cty.ListVal([]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"hello\"),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"friends\"),\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\"map_key\": cty.MapVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"breakfast\": cty.NumberIntVal(800),\n\t\t\t\t\t\"dinner\":    cty.NumberIntVal(2000), // sensitive key\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\"map_whole\": cty.MapVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"breakfast\": cty.StringVal(\"pizza\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\"dinner\":    cty.StringVal(\"pizza\"),\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\"nested_block\": cty.ListVal([]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"an_attr\": cty.StringVal(\"secret\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"another\": cty.StringVal(\"not secret\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\"nested_block_set\": cty.ListVal([]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"an_attr\": cty.StringVal(\"secret\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"another\": cty.StringVal(\"not secret\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.NullVal(cty.EmptyObject),\n\t\t\tBeforeSensitivePaths: []cty.Path{\n\t\t\t\tcty.Path{cty.GetAttrStep{Name: \"ami\"}},\n\t\t\t\tcty.Path{cty.GetAttrStep{Name: \"list_field\"}, cty.IndexStep{Key: cty.NumberIntVal(1)}},\n\t\t\t\tcty.Path{cty.GetAttrStep{Name: \"map_key\"}, cty.IndexStep{Key: cty.StringVal(\"dinner\")}},\n\t\t\t\tcty.Path{cty.GetAttrStep{Name: \"map_whole\"}},\n\t\t\t\tcty.Path{cty.GetAttrStep{Name: \"nested_block\"}},\n\t\t\t\tcty.Path{cty.GetAttrStep{Name: \"nested_block_set\"}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":         {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"ami\":        {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"list_field\": {Type: cty.List(cty.String), Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"map_key\":    {Type: cty.Map(cty.Number), Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"map_whole\":  {Type: cty.Map(cty.String), Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tBlockTypes: map[string]*configschema.NestedBlock{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"nested_block_set\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tBlock: configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"an_attr\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"another\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNesting: configschema.NestingSet,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example will be destroyed\n  - resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      - ami        = (sensitive value) -> null\n      - id         = \"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\" -> null\n      - list_field = [\n          - \"hello\",\n          - (sensitive value),\n        ] -> null\n      - map_key    = {\n          - \"breakfast\" = 800\n          - \"dinner\"    = (sensitive value)\n        } -> null\n      - map_whole  = (sensitive value) -> null\n\n      - nested_block_set {\n          # At least one attribute in this block is (or was) sensitive,\n          # so its contents will not be displayed.\n        }\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"update with sensitive value forcing replacement\": {\n\t\t\tAction: plans.DeleteThenCreate,\n\t\t\tMode:   addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"ami\": cty.StringVal(\"ami-BEFORE\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"nested_block_set\": cty.SetVal([]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"an_attr\": cty.StringVal(\"secret\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"ami\": cty.StringVal(\"ami-AFTER\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"nested_block_set\": cty.SetVal([]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"an_attr\": cty.StringVal(\"changed\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tBeforeSensitivePaths: []cty.Path{\n\t\t\t\tcty.GetAttrPath(\"ami\"),\n\t\t\t\tcty.GetAttrPath(\"nested_block_set\"),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tAfterSensitivePaths: []cty.Path{\n\t\t\t\tcty.GetAttrPath(\"ami\"),\n\t\t\t\tcty.GetAttrPath(\"nested_block_set\"),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"ami\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tBlockTypes: map[string]*configschema.NestedBlock{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"nested_block_set\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tBlock: configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"an_attr\": {Type: cty.String, Required: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNesting: configschema.NestingSet,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(\n\t\t\t\tcty.GetAttrPath(\"ami\"),\n\t\t\t\tcty.GetAttrPath(\"nested_block_set\"),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example must be replaced\n-/+ resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      ~ ami = (sensitive value) # forces replacement\n        id  = \"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"\n\n      - nested_block_set { # forces replacement\n          # At least one attribute in this block is (or was) sensitive,\n          # so its contents will not be displayed.\n        }\n      + nested_block_set { # forces replacement\n          # At least one attribute in this block is (or was) sensitive,\n          # so its contents will not be displayed.\n        }\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"update with sensitive attribute forcing replacement\": {\n\t\t\tAction: plans.DeleteThenCreate,\n\t\t\tMode:   addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"ami\": cty.StringVal(\"ami-BEFORE\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"ami\": cty.StringVal(\"ami-AFTER\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"ami\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Computed: true, Sensitive: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(\n\t\t\t\tcty.GetAttrPath(\"ami\"),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example must be replaced\n-/+ resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      ~ ami = (sensitive value) # forces replacement\n        id  = \"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"update with sensitive nested type attribute forcing replacement\": {\n\t\t\tAction: plans.DeleteThenCreate,\n\t\t\tMode:   addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\": cty.StringVal(\"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"conn_info\": cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"user\":     cty.StringVal(\"not-secret\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\"password\": cty.StringVal(\"top-secret\"),\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\": cty.StringVal(\"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"conn_info\": cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"user\":     cty.StringVal(\"not-secret\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\"password\": cty.StringVal(\"new-secret\"),\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"conn_info\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNestedType: &configschema.Object{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tNesting: configschema.NestingSingle,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"user\":     {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"password\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Sensitive: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(\n\t\t\t\tcty.GetAttrPath(\"conn_info\"),\n\t\t\t\tcty.GetAttrPath(\"password\"),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example must be replaced\n-/+ resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      ~ conn_info = { # forces replacement\n          ~ password = (sensitive value)\n            # (1 unchanged attribute hidden)\n        }\n        id        = \"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\trunTestCases(t, testCases)\n}\n\nfunc TestResourceChange_moved(t *testing.T) {\n\tprevRunAddr := addrs.Resource{\n\t\tMode: addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\tType: \"test_instance\",\n\t\tName: \"previous\",\n\t}.Instance(addrs.NoKey).Absolute(addrs.RootModuleInstance)\n\n\ttestCases := map[string]testCase{\n\t\t\"moved and updated\": {\n\t\t\tPrevRunAddr: prevRunAddr,\n\t\t\tAction:      plans.Update,\n\t\t\tMode:        addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"12345\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"foo\": cty.StringVal(\"hello\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"bar\": cty.StringVal(\"baz\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"12345\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"foo\": cty.StringVal(\"hello\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"bar\": cty.StringVal(\"boop\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  {Type: cty.String, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example will be updated in-place\n  # (moved from test_instance.previous)\n  ~ resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      ~ bar = \"baz\" -> \"boop\"\n        id  = \"12345\"\n        # (1 unchanged attribute hidden)\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"moved without changes\": {\n\t\t\tPrevRunAddr: prevRunAddr,\n\t\t\tAction:      plans.NoOp,\n\t\t\tMode:        addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"12345\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"foo\": cty.StringVal(\"hello\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"bar\": cty.StringVal(\"baz\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"12345\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"foo\": cty.StringVal(\"hello\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"bar\": cty.StringVal(\"baz\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  {Type: cty.String, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.previous has moved to test_instance.example\n    resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n        id  = \"12345\"\n        # (2 unchanged attributes hidden)\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\trunTestCases(t, testCases)\n}\n\ntype testCase struct {\n\tAction               plans.Action\n\tActionReason         plans.ResourceInstanceChangeActionReason\n\tModuleInst           addrs.ModuleInstance\n\tMode                 addrs.ResourceMode\n\tInstanceKey          addrs.InstanceKey\n\tDeposedKey           states.DeposedKey\n\tBefore               cty.Value\n\tBeforeSensitivePaths []cty.Path\n\tAfter                cty.Value\n\tAfterSensitivePaths  []cty.Path\n\tSchema               *configschema.Block\n\tRequiredReplace      cty.PathSet\n\tExpectedOutput       string\n\tPrevRunAddr          addrs.AbsResourceInstance\n}\n\nfunc runTestCases(t *testing.T, testCases map[string]testCase) {\n\tcolor := &colorstring.Colorize{Colors: colorstring.DefaultColors, Disable: true}\n\n\tfor name, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tty := tc.Schema.ImpliedType()\n\n\t\t\tbeforeVal := tc.Before\n\t\t\tswitch { // Some fixups to make the test cases a little easier to write\n\t\t\tcase beforeVal.IsNull():\n\t\t\t\tbeforeVal = cty.NullVal(ty) // allow mistyped nulls\n\t\t\tcase !beforeVal.IsKnown():\n\t\t\t\tbeforeVal = cty.UnknownVal(ty) // allow mistyped unknowns\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tafterVal := tc.After\n\t\t\tswitch { // Some fixups to make the test cases a little easier to write\n\t\t\tcase afterVal.IsNull():\n\t\t\t\tafterVal = cty.NullVal(ty) // allow mistyped nulls\n\t\t\tcase !afterVal.IsKnown():\n\t\t\t\tafterVal = cty.UnknownVal(ty) // allow mistyped unknowns\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\taddr := addrs.Resource{\n\t\t\t\tMode: tc.Mode,\n\t\t\t\tType: \"test_instance\",\n\t\t\t\tName: \"example\",\n\t\t\t}.Instance(tc.InstanceKey).Absolute(tc.ModuleInst)\n\n\t\t\tprevRunAddr := tc.PrevRunAddr\n\t\t\t// If no previous run address is given, reuse the current address\n\t\t\t// to make initialization easier\n\t\t\tif prevRunAddr.Resource.Resource.Type == \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tprevRunAddr = addr\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tbeforeDynamicValue, err := plans.NewDynamicValue(beforeVal, ty)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"failed to create dynamic before value: \" + err.Error())\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tafterDynamicValue, err := plans.NewDynamicValue(afterVal, ty)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"failed to create dynamic after value: \" + err.Error())\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tsrc := &plans.ResourceInstanceChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\tChangeSrc: plans.ChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\t\tAction:               tc.Action,\n\t\t\t\t\tBefore:               beforeDynamicValue,\n\t\t\t\t\tBeforeSensitivePaths: tc.BeforeSensitivePaths,\n\t\t\t\t\tAfter:                afterDynamicValue,\n\t\t\t\t\tAfterSensitivePaths:  tc.AfterSensitivePaths,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\n\t\t\t\tAddr:        addr,\n\t\t\t\tPrevRunAddr: prevRunAddr,\n\t\t\t\tDeposedKey:  tc.DeposedKey,\n\t\t\t\tProviderAddr: addrs.AbsProviderConfig{\n\t\t\t\t\tProvider: addrs.NewDefaultProvider(\"test\"),\n\t\t\t\t\tModule:   addrs.RootModule,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tActionReason:    tc.ActionReason,\n\t\t\t\tRequiredReplace: tc.RequiredReplace,\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\ttfschemas := &terraform.Schemas{\n\t\t\t\tProviders: map[addrs.Provider]providers.ProviderSchema{\n\t\t\t\t\tsrc.ProviderAddr.Provider: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tResourceTypes: map[string]providers.Schema{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsrc.Addr.Resource.Resource.Type: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBlock: tc.Schema,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tDataSources: map[string]providers.Schema{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsrc.Addr.Resource.Resource.Type: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBlock: tc.Schema,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tjsonchanges, err := jsonplan.MarshalResourceChanges([]*plans.ResourceInstanceChangeSrc{src}, tfschemas)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"failed to marshal resource changes: \" + err.Error())\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tjsonschemas := jsonprovider.MarshalForRenderer(tfschemas)\n\t\t\tchange := structured.FromJsonChange(jsonchanges[0].Change, attribute_path.AlwaysMatcher())\n\t\t\trenderer := Renderer{Colorize: color}\n\t\t\tdiff := diff{\n\t\t\t\tchange: jsonchanges[0],\n\t\t\t\tdiff:   differ.ComputeDiffForBlock(change, jsonschemas[jsonchanges[0].ProviderName].ResourceSchemas[jsonchanges[0].Type].Block),\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\toutput, _ := renderHumanDiff(renderer, diff, proposedChange)\n\t\t\tif diff := cmp.Diff(output, tc.ExpectedOutput); diff != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"wrong output\\nexpected:\\n%s\\nactual:\\n%s\\ndiff:\\n%s\\n\", tc.ExpectedOutput, output, diff)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestOutputChanges(t *testing.T) {\n\tcolor := &colorstring.Colorize{Colors: colorstring.DefaultColors, Disable: true}\n\n\ttestCases := map[string]struct {\n\t\tchanges []*plans.OutputChangeSrc\n\t\toutput  string\n\t}{\n\t\t\"new output value\": {\n\t\t\t[]*plans.OutputChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.NullVal(cty.DynamicPseudoType),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"bar\"),\n\t\t\t\t\tfalse,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t`  + foo = \"bar\"`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"removed output\": {\n\t\t\t[]*plans.OutputChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"bar\"),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.NullVal(cty.DynamicPseudoType),\n\t\t\t\t\tfalse,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t`  - foo = \"bar\" -> null`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"single string change\": {\n\t\t\t[]*plans.OutputChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"bar\"),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"baz\"),\n\t\t\t\t\tfalse,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t`  ~ foo = \"bar\" -> \"baz\"`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"element added to list\": {\n\t\t\t[]*plans.OutputChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.ListVal([]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"alpha\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"beta\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"delta\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"epsilon\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.ListVal([]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"alpha\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"beta\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"gamma\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"delta\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"epsilon\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\tfalse,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t`  ~ foo = [\n        # (1 unchanged element hidden)\n        \"beta\",\n      + \"gamma\",\n        \"delta\",\n        # (1 unchanged element hidden)\n    ]`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"multiple outputs changed, one sensitive\": {\n\t\t\t[]*plans.OutputChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"a\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.NumberIntVal(1),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.NumberIntVal(2),\n\t\t\t\t\tfalse,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"b\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"hunter2\"),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"correct-horse-battery-staple\"),\n\t\t\t\t\ttrue,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"c\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.BoolVal(false),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.BoolVal(true),\n\t\t\t\t\tfalse,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t`  ~ a = 1 -> 2\n  ~ b = (sensitive value)\n  ~ c = false -> true`,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor name, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tchanges := &plans.ChangesSrc{\n\t\t\t\tOutputs: tc.changes,\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\toutputs, err := jsonplan.MarshalOutputChanges(changes)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"failed to marshal output changes\")\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\trenderer := Renderer{Colorize: color}\n\t\t\tdiffs := precomputeDiffs(Plan{\n\t\t\t\tOutputChanges: outputs,\n\t\t\t}, plans.NormalMode)\n\n\t\t\toutput := renderHumanDiffOutputs(renderer, diffs.outputs)\n\t\t\tif output != tc.output {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Unexpected diff.\\ngot:\\n%s\\nwant:\\n%s\\n\", output, tc.output)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestResourceChange_deferredActions(t *testing.T) {\n\tcolor := &colorstring.Colorize{Colors: colorstring.DefaultColors, Disable: true}\n\tproviderAddr := addrs.AbsProviderConfig{\n\t\tProvider: addrs.NewDefaultProvider(\"test\"),\n\t\tModule:   addrs.RootModule,\n\t}\n\ttestCases := map[string]struct {\n\t\tchanges []*plans.DeferredResourceInstanceChange\n\t\toutput  string\n\t}{\n\t\t\"deferred create action\": {\n\t\t\tchanges: []*plans.DeferredResourceInstanceChange{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDeferredReason: providers.DeferredReasonAbsentPrereq,\n\t\t\t\t\tChange: &plans.ResourceInstanceChange{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAddr: addrs.Resource{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMode: addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType: \"test_instance\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"instance\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}.Instance(addrs.NoKey).Absolute(addrs.RootModuleInstance),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tProviderAddr: providerAddr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tChange: plans.Change{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction: plans.Create,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBefore: cty.NullVal(cty.DynamicPseudoType),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.UnknownVal(cty.String),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"ami\": cty.StringVal(\"bar\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"disk\": cty.UnknownVal(cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"mount_point\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"size\":        cty.Number,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"root_block_device\": cty.UnknownVal(cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"volume_type\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\toutput: `  # test_instance.instance was deferred\n  # (because a prerequisite for this resource has not yet been created)\n  + resource \"test_instance\" \"instance\" {\n      + ami  = \"bar\"\n      + disk = (known after apply)\n      + id   = (known after apply)\n\n      + root_block_device (known after apply)\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\n\t\t\"deferred create action unknown for_each\": {\n\t\t\tchanges: []*plans.DeferredResourceInstanceChange{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDeferredReason: providers.DeferredReasonInstanceCountUnknown,\n\t\t\t\t\tChange: &plans.ResourceInstanceChange{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAddr: addrs.Resource{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMode: addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType: \"test_instance\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"instance\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}.Instance(addrs.WildcardKey).Absolute(addrs.RootModuleInstance),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tProviderAddr: providerAddr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tChange: plans.Change{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction: plans.Create,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBefore: cty.NullVal(cty.DynamicPseudoType),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.UnknownVal(cty.String),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"ami\": cty.StringVal(\"bar\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"disk\": cty.UnknownVal(cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"mount_point\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"size\":        cty.Number,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"root_block_device\": cty.UnknownVal(cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"volume_type\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\toutput: `  # test_instance.instance[*] was deferred\n  # (because the number of resource instances is unknown)\n  + resource \"test_instance\" \"instance\" {\n      + ami  = \"bar\"\n      + disk = (known after apply)\n      + id   = (known after apply)\n\n      + root_block_device (known after apply)\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\n\t\t\"deferred update action\": {\n\t\t\tchanges: []*plans.DeferredResourceInstanceChange{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDeferredReason: providers.DeferredReasonProviderConfigUnknown,\n\t\t\t\t\tChange: &plans.ResourceInstanceChange{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAddr: addrs.Resource{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMode: addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType: \"test_instance\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"instance\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}.Instance(addrs.NoKey).Absolute(addrs.RootModuleInstance),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tProviderAddr: providerAddr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tChange: plans.Change{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction: plans.Update,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"foo\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"ami\": cty.StringVal(\"bar\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"disk\": cty.NullVal(cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"mount_point\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"size\":        cty.Number,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"root_block_device\": cty.NullVal(cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"volume_type\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"foo\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"ami\": cty.StringVal(\"baz\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"disk\": cty.NullVal(cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"mount_point\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"size\":        cty.Number,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"root_block_device\": cty.NullVal(cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"volume_type\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\toutput: `  # test_instance.instance was deferred\n  # (because the provider configuration is unknown)\n  ~ resource \"test_instance\" \"instance\" {\n      ~ ami = \"bar\" -> \"baz\"\n        id  = \"foo\"\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\n\t\t\"deferred destroy action\": {\n\t\t\tchanges: []*plans.DeferredResourceInstanceChange{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDeferredReason: providers.DeferredReasonResourceConfigUnknown,\n\t\t\t\t\tChange: &plans.ResourceInstanceChange{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAddr: addrs.Resource{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMode: addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType: \"test_instance\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"instance\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}.Instance(addrs.NoKey).Absolute(addrs.RootModuleInstance),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tProviderAddr: providerAddr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tChange: plans.Change{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction: plans.Update,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"foo\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"ami\": cty.StringVal(\"bar\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"disk\": cty.NullVal(cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"mount_point\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"size\":        cty.Number,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"root_block_device\": cty.NullVal(cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"volume_type\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAfter: cty.NullVal(cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"ami\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"disk\": cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"mount_point\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"size\":        cty.Number,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"root_block_device\": cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"volume_type\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\toutput: `  # test_instance.instance was deferred\n  # (because the resource configuration is unknown)\n  ~ resource \"test_instance\" \"instance\" {\n      - ami = \"bar\" -> null\n      - id  = \"foo\" -> null\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor name, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tblockSchema := testSchema(configschema.NestingSingle)\n\t\t\tfullSchema := &terraform.Schemas{\n\t\t\t\tProviders: map[addrs.Provider]providers.ProviderSchema{\n\t\t\t\t\tproviderAddr.Provider: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tResourceTypes: map[string]providers.Schema{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"test_instance\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBlock: blockSchema,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tvar changes []*plans.DeferredResourceInstanceChangeSrc\n\t\t\tfor _, change := range tc.changes {\n\t\t\t\tchangeSrc, err := change.Encode(blockSchema.ImpliedType())\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Failed to encode change: %s\", err)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tchanges = append(changes, changeSrc)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tdeferredChanges, err := jsonplan.MarshalDeferredResourceChanges(changes, fullSchema)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"failed to marshal deferred changes: %s\", err)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\trenderer := Renderer{Colorize: color}\n\t\t\tjsonschemas := jsonprovider.MarshalForRenderer(fullSchema)\n\t\t\tdiffs := precomputeDiffs(Plan{\n\t\t\t\tDeferredChanges: deferredChanges,\n\t\t\t\tProviderSchemas: jsonschemas,\n\t\t\t}, plans.NormalMode)\n\n\t\t\t// TODO: Add diffing for outputs\n\t\t\t// TODO: Make sure it's true and either make it a single entity in the test case or deal with a list here\n\t\t\toutput, _ := renderHumanDeferredDiff(renderer, diffs.deferred[0])\n\t\t\tif diff := cmp.Diff(tc.output, output); len(diff) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"unexpected output\\ngot:\\n%s\\nwant:\\n%s\\ndiff:\\n%s\", output, tc.output, diff)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc outputChange(name string, before, after cty.Value, sensitive bool) *plans.OutputChangeSrc {\n\taddr := addrs.AbsOutputValue{\n\t\tOutputValue: addrs.OutputValue{Name: name},\n\t}\n\n\tchange := &plans.OutputChange{\n\t\tAddr: addr, Change: plans.Change{\n\t\t\tBefore: before,\n\t\t\tAfter:  after,\n\t\t},\n\t\tSensitive: sensitive,\n\t}\n\n\tchangeSrc, err := change.Encode()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tpanic(fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to encode change for %s: %s\", addr, err))\n\t}\n\n\treturn changeSrc\n}\n\n// A basic test schema using a configurable NestingMode for one (NestedType) attribute and one block\nfunc testSchema(nesting configschema.NestingMode) *configschema.Block {\n\tvar diskKey = \"disks\"\n\tif nesting == configschema.NestingSingle {\n\t\tdiskKey = \"disk\"\n\t}\n\n\treturn &configschema.Block{\n\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\"id\":  {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\"ami\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\tdiskKey: {\n\t\t\t\tNestedType: &configschema.Object{\n\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"mount_point\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"size\":        {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\tNesting: nesting,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\tBlockTypes: map[string]*configschema.NestedBlock{\n\t\t\t\"root_block_device\": {\n\t\t\t\tBlock: configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"volume_type\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOptional: true,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tComputed: true,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tNesting: nesting,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\n// A basic test schema using a configurable NestingMode for one (NestedType)\n// attribute marked sensitive.\nfunc testSchemaSensitive(nesting configschema.NestingMode) *configschema.Block {\n\treturn &configschema.Block{\n\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\"id\":  {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\"ami\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\"disks\": {\n\t\t\t\tSensitive: true,\n\t\t\t\tNestedType: &configschema.Object{\n\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"mount_point\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"size\":        {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\tNesting: nesting,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc testSchemaMultipleBlocks(nesting configschema.NestingMode) *configschema.Block {\n\treturn &configschema.Block{\n\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\"id\":  {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\"ami\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\"disks\": {\n\t\t\t\tNestedType: &configschema.Object{\n\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"mount_point\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"size\":        {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\tNesting: nesting,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\tBlockTypes: map[string]*configschema.NestedBlock{\n\t\t\t\"root_block_device\": {\n\t\t\t\tBlock: configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"volume_type\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOptional: true,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tComputed: true,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tNesting: nesting,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\"leaf_block_device\": {\n\t\t\t\tBlock: configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"volume_type\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType: with the addition of a \"new_field\" block\nfunc testSchemaPlus(nesting configschema.NestingMode) *configschema.Block {\n\tvar diskKey = \"disks\"\n\tif nesting == configschema.NestingSingle {\n\t\tdiskKey = \"disk\"\n\t}\n\n\treturn &configschema.Block{\n\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\"id\":  {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\"ami\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\tdiskKey: {\n\t\t\t\tNestedType: &configschema.Object{\n\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"mount_point\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"size\":        {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\tNesting: nesting,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\tBlockTypes: map[string]*configschema.NestedBlock{\n\t\t\t\"root_block_device\": {\n\t\t\t\tBlock: configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"volume_type\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOptional: true,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tComputed: true,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"new_field\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOptional: true,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tComputed: true,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tNesting: nesting,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc marshalJson(t *testing.T, data interface{}) json.RawMessage {\n\tresult, err := json.Marshal(data)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tt.Fatalf(\"failed to marshal json: %v\", err)\n\t}\n\treturn result\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [

  "userModified": false
}

  "file": {
    "content": "func (renderer unknownRenderer) RenderHuman(diff computed.Diff, indent int, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) string {\n\tif diff.Action == plans.Create || renderer.before.Renderer == nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"(known after apply)%s\", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n\t}\n\n\tbeforeOpts := opts.Clone()\n\t// Never render null suffix for children of unknown changes.\n\tbeforeOpts.OverrideNullSuffix = true\n\tif diff.Replace {\n\t\t// If we're displaying forces replacement for the overall unknown\n\t\t// change, then do not display it for the before specifically.\n\t\tbeforeOpts.ForbidForcesReplacement = true\n\t}\n\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%s -> (known after apply)%s\", renderer.before.RenderHuman(indent, beforeOpts), forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n}",
    "filePath": "/workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/unknown.go",
    "numLines": 15,
    "startLine": 28,
    "totalLines": 43
  },
  "type": "text"
}

        Code Changes (8)
        
1. EDIT /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/unknown.go
Before
func (renderer unknownRenderer) RenderHuman(diff computed.Diff, indent int, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) string {
	if diff.Action == plans.Create {
		return fmt.Sprintf("(known after apply)%s", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))
	}

	beforeOpts := opts.Clone()
	// Never render null suffix for children of unknown changes.
	beforeOpts.OverrideNullSuffix = true
	if diff.Replace {
		// If we're displaying forces replacement for the overall unknown
		// change, then do not display it for the before specifically.
		beforeOpts.ForbidForcesReplacement = true
	}
	return fmt.Sprintf("%s -> (known after apply)%s", renderer.before.RenderHuman(indent, beforeOpts), forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))
}
After
func (renderer unknownRenderer) RenderHuman(diff computed.Diff, indent int, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) string {
	if diff.Action == plans.Create || renderer.before.Renderer == nil {
		return fmt.Sprintf("(known after apply)%s", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))
	}

	beforeOpts := opts.Clone()
	// Never render null suffix for children of unknown changes.
	beforeOpts.OverrideNullSuffix = true
	if diff.Replace {
		// If we're displaying forces replacement for the overall unknown
		// change, then do not display it for the before specifically.
		beforeOpts.ForbidForcesReplacement = true
	}
	return fmt.Sprintf("%s -> (known after apply)%s", renderer.before.RenderHuman(indent, beforeOpts), forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))
}

Before

          - volume_type = "gp1" -> null
        }
      - root_block_device {

        Bash Commands (50)
        
1. $ find /workspace -type f -name "unknown.go" | head -5
2. $ find /workspace -type f -name "block.go" | grep -E "plan|render" | head -5
3. $ find /workspace -type f -name "renderer_test.go" | head -5
4. $ find /workspace -type f -name "plan_test.go" | grep jsonformat | head -5
5. $ go test ./internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/... -v 2>&1 | head -200
6. $ ls -la /workspace | head -30
7. $ wc -l /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
8. $ grep -n "computed_update_from_null" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/renderer_test.go
9. $ grep -n "unknown_" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/renderer_test.go | head -20
10. $ grep -n "plans.Update" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/renderer_test.go | head -10
11. $ grep -n "type Diff struct" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/*.go
12. $ grep -A 15 '"primitive_update_string_from_null"' /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/renderer_test.go
13. $ grep -n "unknown.*update" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go -i | head -20
14. $ grep -n 'UnknownBlocks' /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat -r | head -10
15. $ grep -n '"primitive_update_string_from_null"' /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/renderer_test.go
16. $ grep -n '"computed' /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/renderer_test.go | head -20
17. $ grep -n "^[[:space:]]*\+" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep -i "unknown\|computed" | head -20
18. $ grep -n '"+' /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep "block\|nested" | head -20
19. $ grep -n "UnknownBlocks" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
20. $ grep -n '".*block.*update' /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go -i | head -20
21. $ grep -n "^func Test" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
22. $ grep -n "(known after apply)" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | head -20
23. $ grep -B5 "unknown block" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go -i
24. $ grep -n '"in-place update - unknown block' /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
25. $ sed -n '3545,3560p' /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
26. $ for line in 3506 4233 4763 5835; do
  echo "=== Test at line $line ==="
  sed -n "${line}p" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
  grep -A 2 "root_block_device (known after apply)" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | sed -n "${line},$((line+20))p"
done

27. $ grep -n "+.*root_block_device (known after apply)" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
28. $ for linenum in 3551 4278 4808; do
  testname_line=$((linenum - 45))
  echo "=== Line $linenum ===" 
  sed -n "${testname_line},${linenum}p" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep -E '(in-place|Action:|root_block_device)'
done
29. $ grep -n "in-place update - unknown block with replace" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
30. $ grep -B100 "in-place update - unknown block" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep -E "(Action: plans\.(Update|Create))" | tail -4
31. $ grep -n '"in-place update - unknown block"' /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep -v "with replace"
32. $ awk '/func TestResourceChange_nestedList/,/^func / {
  if (/"+.*root_block_device \(known after apply\)/) print NR": "$0
}' /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
33. $ for linenum in 3551 4278 4808; do
  echo "Line $linenum: $(sed -n "${linenum}p" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go)"
done
34. $ grep -n "func TestResourceChange" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | awk -F: '{print $1, $2}'
35. $ for linenum in 3551 3610 4230 4278 4337 4760 4808 4867 5832; do
  testname_line=$((linenum - 45))
  action_line=$((linenum - 44))
  
  action=$(sed -n "${action_line},${action_line}p" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep -oE "plans\.[A-Za-z]+")
  testname=$(sed -n "${testname_line},${testname_line}p" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | sed 's/.*"\(.*\)".*/\1/')
  
  echo "Line $linenum: $testname - $action"
done
36. $ for linenum in 3551 3610 4230 4278 4337 4760 4808 4867 5832; do
  echo "=== Line $linenum ==="
  sed -n "$((linenum-50)),$((linenum))p" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep -E '(Action:|"in-place)'
done
37. $ grep -n '"in-place update - unknown block"' /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | wc -l
38. $ grep -c "in-place update - unknown block" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
39. $ for line_num in 3506 4233 4763 5835; do
  start=$((line_num))
  end=$((line_num + 40))
  echo "=== Test starting at line $line_num ==="
  sed -n "${start},${end}p" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep -E "(root_block_device|ExpectedOutput:|root_block_device \(known after apply\))" | head -3
done
40. $ sed -n '3545,3560p' /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
41. $ grep -n "in-place update - unknown" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
42. $ for line_num in 3423 4150 4680 5764; do
  echo "=== Test starting at line $line_num ==="
  sed -n "${line_num},$((line_num+60))p" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep -E "(\+ root_block_device|Action:)" | head -2
done
43. $ for line_num in 3506 4233 4763 5835; do
  echo "=== Test at line $line_num ==="
  sed -n "${line_num},$((line_num+80))p" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep -c "+ root_block_device"
done
44. $ sed -n '3545,3560p' /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep -c "+ root_block_device"
45. $ for linenum in 3551 4278 4808; do
  echo "=== Line $linenum ==="
  sed -n "${linenum}p" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
done
46. $ git diff --stat
47. $ git diff internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/unknown.go
48. $ git diff internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/block.go
49. $ git diff internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/renderer_test.go
50. $ git diff internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | head -100
